name: Push CA into Container
description: Writes the deployer's CA certificate (from the PVE host's /usr/local/share/ca-certificates/proxvex-ca.crt) into the LXC container's system trust store while the container is still stopped, by mounting its rootfs offline via vol_mount. Drops the file at /usr/local/share/ca-certificates/proxvex-ca.crt and splices it into /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt so the cert is trusted from first boot without needing update-ca-certificates to run inside. Docker daemon picks it up via its system-trust fallback. No-op when the host has no CA file.
